title: Barebones PVP Armor Durability Overlay [No Optifine]
description: Implements an armor Hud for 1.21.4+ using the "variants-cit" mod for the Barebones texture pack
body:
Barebones Armor Durability works without optifine what means you can use it with sodium. It uses a mod called "varients-cit" to make this work. It works on all versions above 1.21.4 even if it says incompatible ingame.

With this texturepack you can improve the Barebones texturepack experience a lot. Its the one of the most used pvp packs but still hasnt got a fitting armor hud so why dont make one.

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/168345e92d46227041ac2c04eb9a2e54e978c55a.png)
